# FadeJunkie Educational Hub

> A free study tool for Texas barber students preparing for the state board exam — flashcards, quizzes, and live group study, built by FadeJunkie, a barber culture brand made by barbers.

FadeJunkie Educational Hub is the first digital product from FadeJunkie. It's free, it always will be, and it's built for barber students studying between clients and classes — not a general cosmetology tool, not a full LMS, not a booking system.

## Study Tools

- [Education Hub](https://fadejunkie.com/education): Entry point to all study modes.
- [Flashcards](https://fadejunkie.com/education/flash): 300 Texas state board questions across two decks, filterable by topic (Life Skills, History, Anatomy, Tools, Sanitation, and more). Star cards to build a personal weak-spot deck.
- [Solo Quiz](https://fadejunkie.com/education/quiz): Timed multiple-choice quiz (20/50/100/150 questions), randomized from the full question bank or by topic, scored with a per-topic breakdown.
- [Practical Exam Guide](https://fadejunkie.com/education/practical): Guidance for the hands-on portion of the Texas state board exam.

## Barber Culture

- [FadeJunkie](https://fadejunkie.com/): Homepage — who FadeJunkie is and what it's building.
- [Barber Culture](https://fadejunkie.com/barber): Brand and culture content for working barbers.

## Partners

- [Partners](https://fadejunkie.com/partners): For barber schools and instructors looking for group study tools their students will actually use.

## Notes

- No account required to use flashcards or solo quiz. An account (Google sign-in) is only needed to save progress or join a live group quiz room.
- Content is sourced from Milady published materials; Texas curriculum only, for now.
